name: exploratory-data-analysis
tagline: Automates exploratory data analysis on 200+ scientific file formats, producing markdown reports with quality metrics and recommendations.
verdict: Clean, benign skill. No credential access, network egress, shell-piped remote code, destructive ops, obfuscation, or manipulation of the reviewer/agent found. It only reads local scientific data files and writes markdown reports. Minor gaps: no explicit 'when NOT to use' guidance, and bundled reference/script files (referenced but not fetched here) were not

highlights.summary: No explicit negative-trigger / 'when NOT to use' guidance is present anywhere in the file, so an agent could misapply it to non-scientific or non-file-based requests.
